text: A tall clock tower under a cloudy sky.
The rider urges her horse over the obstacle in the competition.
A large brown bear peering into the water at the edge of a stream.
An aerial view of a foreign town with pedestrians walking the streets.
A bed in a hotel room sitting next to a window.
A flock of sheep graze on a hillside.
A man standing in the kitchen looking at the floor.

some food cooking in the oven on some tin foil
A few plans sit on the runway, while one plane is being loaded up.
